description_long: This is a polygonal, barrel-shaped cup with alternating dark brown and beige horizontal bands, giving it a rustic, handcrafted appearance. The cup features a prominent, angular handle attached to one side, colored in beige to match the lighter bands. On the front, a white handprint motif is visible, adding a unique decorative touch. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, suggesting a wooden or ceramic construction. The cup's interior is not visible, but it is likely hollow and capable of holding liquids. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for casual or themed urban environments such as cafes, parks, or street markets.
description: A rustic, barrel-shaped cup with dark brown and beige stripes, an angular handle, and a white handprint motif on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right and a white handprint motif on the dark brown band.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle centered, showing the alternating bands and no visible motif.
description_view_2: Front-left view with the handle on the left and the handprint motif visible on the front.
description_view_3: Back view with no handle or motif visible, only the striped pattern.
